Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class MobileApplicationDetail

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.MobileApplicationDetail
public class MobileApplicationDetail extends SObject

Java class for MobileApplicationDetail complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MobileApplicationDetail">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AppInstallUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApplicationBinary" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}base64Binary" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApplicationBinaryFileName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApplicationBundleIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApplicationFileLength" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApplicationIcon" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApplicationIconFileName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DevicePlatform" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeviceType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEnterpriseApp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Language" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MinimumOsVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Version" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
